d!d"
z$create a built (binary) distribution)
bdist-base=
bz4temporary directory for creating built distributionsz
plat-name=
pz;platform name to embed in generated filenames (default: %s))
Nz/formats for distribution (comma-separated list))
z	dist-dir=
dz=directory to put final built distributions in [default: dist])
skip-buildNz2skip rebuilding everything (for testing/debugging))
owner=
uz@Owner name used when creating a tar file [default: current user])
group=
gzAGroup name used when creating a tar file [default: current group]r
